result.reason: Implement functionality to merge multiple mRemoteNG configuration files and to automatically export the current configuration based on user-defined settings.
result.approach: Implement a configuration merge utility that can combine multiple .mRemoteNG files, handling conflicts appropriately. Develop an auto-export feature with configurable settings for save frequency and target location, leveraging existing XML serialization.
